title: All News
content: All News | Name View/download Mr. Mukund Mitra, a Prime Minister Research Fellow from Robert Bosch Center for Cyber Physical Systems, Indian Institute of Science, Bengaluru is teaching robotics related courses to the final year students in ECE Department. Student of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics Dept. selected for direct Ph.D. in IISc Banglore Download Ankush Bansal (Ph.D. Scholar - Dept. of BT & BI) selected as Postdoctoral Researcher at World's top 5 Children National Hospital, Washington DC, USA. Download Dr. Ashutosh Sharma (Ph.D. Scholar- Dept of ECE) has joined Institute of Computer Technology and Information Security, Southern Federal University (SFedU), Rastov-on-Don, Russia as Postdoctoral Research Scientist.
